code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
end

fn skip_ws(_ s: String, _ start: Int, _ n: Int) -> Int
  mut i = start
  mut stop = false
  while i < n and not stop
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        i = i + 1
      else
        stop = true
      end
    when None
      stop = true
    end
  end
  i
end

fn skip_token(_ s: String, _ start: Int, _ n: Int) -> Int
  mut i = start
  mut stop = false
  while i < n and not stop
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        stop = true
      else
        i = i + 1
      end
    when None
      stop = true
    end
  end
  i
end

fn second_token(_ s: String) -> Option<String>
  let n = string.len(s)
  let a = skip_ws(s, 0, n)
  let b = skip_token(s, a, n)
  let c = skip_ws(s, b, n)
  let d = skip_token(s, c, n)
  if c == d
    None
  else
    Some(string.substring(s, c, d))
  end
end

fn line_value(_ line: String) -> Int
  if string.is_empty(line)
    0
  else
    match second_token(line)
    when Some(tok)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(n)
        n
      when None
        0
      end
    when None
      0
    end
  end
end

mut sum = 0
mut eof = false
while not eof
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    sum = sum + line_value(line)
  when None
    eof = true
  end
end
println("sum=#{sum}")
